scripts.test: pnpm test:js && pnpm test:go && pnpm test:python && pnpm test:rust && pnpm test:java
scripts.test:go: cd packages/go && GOCACHE=$(pwd)/../../.cache/go-build GOMODCACHE=$(pwd)/../../.cache/go-mod go test ./...
scripts.check: pnpm check:versions && pnpm verify:definitions:strict && pnpm check:schemas && pnpm check:conformance && pnpm check:generated && pnpm check:tools && pnpm check:js && pnpm check:go && pnpm check:python && pnpm check:rust && pnpm check:java
scripts.check:go: cd packages/go && GOCACHE=$(pwd)/../../.cache/go-build GOMODCACHE=$(pwd)/../../.cache/go-mod go test ./...
scripts.check:python: python3 -m compileall -q packages/python/src packages/python/tests packages/python/scripts && PYTHONPATH=packages/python/src node tools/conformance-runner.mjs --skip-coverage -- python3 packages/python/scripts/conformance.py
scripts.check:rust: cd packages/rust && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=../../.cache/cargo-target CARGO_HOME=../../.cache/cargo-home cargo fmt --check && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=../../.cache/cargo-target CARGO_HOME=../../.cache/cargo-home cargo test
